allow: Bash(node -e "const c = require\(''./scripts/data/courses.json''\); console.log\(''Total courses:'', c.length\); c.forEach\(x => console.log\(''  -'', x.title, ''\('' + x.syllabus.length + '' lessons\)''\)\)")
